Plaintiffs Dolph And Dan Rempp'S Motion For Summary Adjudication (Continuance Per Court Order Of Feb. 4, 2003)
Off Calendar Feb-27-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Heather A. Moser, Esq. of MORRISON & FOERSTER 268-7091, for plaintiffs Dolph Rempp and Dan Rempp, moving for summary adjudication
Sung E. Shim, Esq. of KATZOFF & RIGGS 510/588-5174, for defendant/cross-complainant and opposing party Kroder-Reubel Co., Inc.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Plaintiffs Dolph and Dan Rempp's motion for summary adjudication -- Denied. Triable issue of fact exists re: meaning of paragraph 29 of purchase agreement and obligations created thereby. Defendant is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (DAG/301/NL-X) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
